flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Kutztown University of Pennsylvania rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 ($14.2k → $15.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kutztown University of Pennsylvania fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
